examples: The fire in the vestry had started by accident.
The most he can say is: "I will see you in the vestry after service."
But the enquiry couldn't find a reason for Sir Percival being in the vestry or why he had locked himself in there.
Plans include a new song school, alterations to the clergy vestry and opening access to underground vaults.
Certainly, some parishes have explored the idea of having shops attached to the churches, or opening post office counters in the vestry.
